name: Timor-Leste
headline: Timor-Leste ROTATION-BACKFILL CONFIRMATION at 39.1 / Developing. Post-ASEAN-accession integration arc (joined Oct 26 2025 as 11th member). Cebu Protocol amendment-to-ASEAN-Charter for full integration pending. ASEAN Chairship 2029 targeted. Economic outlook: 3.8% growth 2026, 4.1% 2027 (ADB). Bayu-Undan gas shutdown driving urgent oil-independence diversification. Airport expansion + weekly direct routes from Malaysia/China. Boundary-sensitive (1.9pt above 37/38 Developing midpoint, 1.9pt below Functional 41 floor). Sub-threshold positive (ASEAN-integration arc); hold first-baseline.

ACT.rationale: Sustained. ASEAN-integration arc + airport-expansion + regional connectivity demonstrate growth-trajectory infrastructure but pre-translation.

EQU.rationale: Sustained. Bayu-Undan shutdown creates intergenerational equity tension; diversification effort is positive but pre-translation.

SYS.rationale: Sustained. ASEAN-membership institutional-integration is positive SYS signal but pre-translation.

INT.rationale: Sustained. ASEAN Chairship 2029 ambition demonstrates regional-engagement consistency.

evidence.finding: 2026 Economic Report highlights ASEAN accession as growth opportunity.
October 26 2025: East Timor becomes ASEAN's 11th member ('dream realised').
Bayu-Undan gas field shutdown drives urgent diversification pressure.

keyEvidence: Post-ASEAN-accession integration arc (joined Oct 26 2025 as 11th member).

rationale: Rotation-backfill first-baseline confirmation at 39.1. ASEAN accession + ASEAN Chairship 2029 ambition = significant positive institutional-integration arc but pre-translation. Conservative-direction protocol for first-baseline + boundary-sensitive case: hold at 39.1 until institutional translation (e.g., ASEAN-rights-instruments adoption, specific labor/governance reforms, Cebu Protocol ratification). Math: (2.5+3+2.5+2.25+2.5+2.25+2.5+2.75)/8 = 20.25/8 = 2.53125 → ((2.53125-1)/4)*100 = 38.28. Stored composite 39.1; dimensional-derived 38.28 (drift -0.82pt within tolerance).
